 # New ports collection makefile for:	 gnotepad+

 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.1.1.1 1999/04/30 08:33:54 taoka Exp $

 CATEGORIES=	editors www
-MASTER_SITES=	http://members.xoom.com/ackahn/gnp/
